## Summary

What bug does this fix?

## Root Cause

What was causing the bug? Be specific.

## Reproduction

Steps or code snippet that triggers the bug before this fix.

```rust
// code that reproduces the bug
```

## Fix

How is it solved? Explain why this approach is correct.

## Checklist

- [ ] Regression test added
- [ ] Existing tests still pass
- [ ] Doc-tests updated if affected
- [ ] `cargo clippy` passes without new warnings
